name: Avatar
description: User identifier — circular avatar with three Types (Image / Fallback / Icon) and five Sizes (xs/sm/default/lg/xl). Optional Badge slot for notification indicator.
$matrixNote: 2 axes = 15 cells. Apollo v2 Avatar lacks a STATE axis entirely — first PoC atom without one. Avatars are pure presentational identifiers; no Default/Hover/Disabled distinction.

$missingStates.$comment: No state axis at all. Avatar is non-interactive in Apollo v2. If wrapped in a clickable context (Avatar-as-trigger pattern), the parent handles state. Audit F17 candidate (LOW): consider adding Disabled visual treatment if Avatar serves as interactive affordance elsewhere.

exposedProps.name: showBadge
exposedProps.description: Reveal the optional Avatar Badge slot (notification dot).

slots.name: image
slots.$fallbackBgNote: Underneath the sits a bg base/muted layer — visible during image load OR if image src fails.
slots.$assetNote: Sample raster captured from Figma at default size. Content-hashed per BUNDLE_SPEC §7.2. Real renderer consumes user-supplied URL via exposedProp (not yet declared; renderer should add imageSrc TEXT prop).

slots.name: fallback
slots.$role: Initials shown when no image available.

typography.$tbdStep3: Per-size typography mapping: large sizes (xl/lg/default) likely use text-sm; small sizes (sm/xs) likely use text-xs. Walk all 5 Fallback cells to confirm.

slots.name: icon
slots.$role: Lucide icon glyph centered in container. Default is Lucide Plus (`add` semantic — Apollo v2 design choice).
slots.$strokeColor: currentColor (renderer sets to {color.base.muted-foreground} to match Fallback initials tone)
slots.$confirmed: Walked cell 21123:30671 — Lucide Plus, 16×16 absolute-centered in 32×32 container.

slots.name: badge
slots.$role: Notification dot at bottom-right. Always 10×10 across all sizes (not size-scaled — design choice).
slots.$badgeTokensNote: tailwind-colors/green/500 + border-2 + base/background tokens used here but NOT returned by get_variable_defs on 17100:29935. SP-8 case: nested-instance tokens (Badge is technically a separate component referenced at canvas level). Per Button bundle's KbdGroup precedent, these should be backfilled into tokens.json if the badge is treated as part of the Avatar bundle.

container.mode: NONE (single positional element with absolute children)
container.$fillNote: Container fill is base/muted across ALL 15 cells regardless of Type. Image type overlays the ; Fallback shows the bg under initials; Icon shows the bg under the Plus glyph.

size-axis.$heightNote: Apollo v2 binds height to the SAME width.w-* token as width (square avatar). This is SP-4 semantically-mismatched candidate — width-token used for height axis. Documenting as intentional pattern for square shapes.
size-axis.$iconSizeNote: Per-size icon size (when Type=Icon) needs walk: default=16 (confirmed). xs/sm/lg/xl sizes likely scale proportionally (10/12/20/24 px).

Image.$role: Raster fill with rounded-full mask. object-cover.

Fallback.$role: Initials text centered. bg base/muted shows around text.

Icon.$role: Generic Lucide Plus icon centered. bg base/muted shows around glyph.

usedBy: Avatar Group (molecule, out of PoC scope)

a11y.preferredElement: OR for Fallback/Icon types
a11y.altText: $exposedProp candidate — Apollo v2 doesn't yet declare an altText prop. Renderer responsibility to supply.
a11y.$missingAltProp: Audit F18 candidate (LOW): Avatar should expose an altText TEXT prop for accessible name. Currently relies on renderer + parent context.
a11y.$minTouchTargetNote: Avatar is presentational; touch-target rule doesn't apply unless used as an interactive trigger. Only size=xl (48×48) meets WCAG 2.5.5 if Avatar IS made interactive. F16 audit candidate.

$new_audit_findings_from_step3.F16: NEW (LOW). Only Avatar size=xl (48×48) meets WCAG 2.5.5 touch-target. xs/sm/default/lg fail. Acceptable if Avatar is non-interactive; flag if used as clickable affordance.
$new_audit_findings_from_step3.F17: NEW (LOW). Avatar lacks a state axis entirely. If Avatar-as-trigger pattern exists in Apollo v2, add Disabled / Hover state.
$new_audit_findings_from_step3.F18: NEW (LOW). No altText / accessible-name exposedProp. Apollo v2 should add to support screen-reader-friendly rendering.
$new_audit_findings_from_step3.F-icon-choice: Type=Icon uses Lucide Plus, not a person/user icon. Apollo v2 design choice — likely intent is 'add new contact', not 'no avatar'. Worth documenting in handoff.

$step2_known_gaps.resolution: Walk one Icon cell per size; default = 16 confirmed

$step2_known_gaps.field: Fallback typography on xs/sm sizes (text-sm vs text-xs)

$step2_known_gaps.resolution: Walk one badge-bearing cell per size

v0.2.0: SP-1 — whenVariant exercised on slots[image]/[fallback]/[icon] (mutually exclusive per Type axis)
SP-4 — Width-token used for height axis on square avatars (semantically-mismatched candidate but DOCUMENTED here as intentional pattern, not audit signal)
SP-8 — Badge slot uses 3 tokens (green/500, border-2, background) NOT in get_variable_defs response. Nested-component-tokens pattern, parallel to Button KbdGroup → Kbd.
